title: Kiruna Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Kiruna with a Z-Score of -3.43. The city experiences extremely low temperatures.
body:
The current weather conditions in Kiruna are extremely cold, with a score of 10.0 out of 10, indicating a critical level of cold snap.
The heating degree days (HDD) are at 13.0 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG, showing a significant need for heating. The relative humidity is at 74%, and the wind speed is at 10.1 km/h.
The cold snap is expected to continue, with temperatures remaining low, and the city's infrastructure and residents are advised to take necessary precautions to stay warm and safe.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure safety and minimize disruptions.
